title: God Stands In The Great Assembly

verses.text: God stands in the great assembly, judging all the gods within: how long will you judge unjustly, favoring the wicked men?
“Vindicate the weak and orphans, Guard the rights of those oppressed. Save the weak, support the needy; From the wicked give them rest”.
They are void of understanding; no right judgment can they make. They walk on in utter darkness; all of earth’s foundations shake.
“You are gods,” so I addressed them; “You are sons of God most High. You will fall like other princes, you as common men will die.”
Rise O God, and come in judgement; justice for the earth command, for you hold as your possession ev’ry race and ev’ry land.
